calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-15-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: C. Salceda.
Petitioner: Valerie Nichols Sabbag, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Elise Marie Nichols Hill, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Elise Marie Nichols Sabbag.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-19-2006 Reset To Feb-15-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: David Davenport.
Petitioner: Valerie Nichols Sabbag, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Elise Marie Nichols Hill, was sworn and examined.
Proof of Service/ Non service return received and filed in court.
Application & Declaration in support of order dispensing with notice to minor's parent, filed in court. Order is DENIED.
Lacks the Minor's Father consent or proof of service, the OSC for Change of Name of a Minor: Elise Marie Nichols Hill is continued to Feb.15, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218.
Re-publication is waived.
Petitioner to submit proof of service to the Minor's father of the new hearing date and all other documents filed in court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-17-2006 Reset To Dec-19-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
